title: borreria phyteuma
intro: Borreria phyteuma, a perennial herb also known as African kidney bean, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Borreria phyteuma include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to aid in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or tea, and it can also be used to make infusions, tinctures, or ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
